---
title: "COVID LMR — Analysis (Results Section 5: Geography & IPD Sharing)"
output: html_document
---

# Section 5 — Geographic distribution and IPD sharing

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# ---- Paths ----
in_dir    <- "../data/final"
plots_dir <- "../plots"
if (!dir.exists(plots_dir)) dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ---- Helper functions (defined unconditionally) ----
clean_id <- function(x) str_to_lower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
parse_dmy_safe <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "na", "n/a", "unknown", "-99")] <- NA
  suppressWarnings(dmy(x))
}

# ---- Load data (if not already in session from earlier scripts) ----
if (!exists("study_table")) {
  rdata_in <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "^covid_lmr_clean7_\\d{8}\\.RData$", full.names = TRUE)
  stopifnot(length(rdata_in) >= 1)
  rdata_in <- rdata_in[which.max(file.info(rdata_in)$mtime)]
  load(rdata_in)

  cat("Loaded:", basename(rdata_in), "\n")
  cat("Unique studies (study_table):", n_distinct(study_table$st_reg_id), "\n")

  study_table   <- study_table   %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
  country_table <- country_table %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id))
  arm_table     <- arm_table     %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id))
  pharma_table  <- pharma_table  %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
}

# ---- Era classification (consistent with 03–05 scripts) ----
era_levels <- c(
  "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
  "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
  "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
)

study_table <- study_table %>%
  mutate(era = factor(case_when(
    reg_date < as.Date("2021-05-26") ~ "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    reg_date < as.Date("2023-05-05") ~ "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    TRUE                             ~ "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  ), levels = era_levels))

# ---- Cohort IDs ----
cohort_ids <- study_table$st_reg_id

# ---- Income group colour palette ----
income_colors <- c(
  "High income"          = "#1f77b4",
  "Upper middle income"  = "#2ca02c",
  "Lower middle income"  = "yellow3",
  "Low income"           = "orange1"
)

# ---- Themes (consistent with 03–05 scripts) ----
theme_bar <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text               = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 8)),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = base_size, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 6), color = "#666666"),
      axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = base_size - 1, color = "#444444"),
      axis.ticks         = element_line(color = "#444444", linewidth = 0.25),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.title       = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.text        = element_text(size = base_size - 2),
      legend.key.size    = unit(0.8, "lines"),
      plot.margin        = margin(12, 12, 12, 12)
    )
}

theme_stacked <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text               = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title         = element_text(size = base_size + 4, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = base_size, color = "#666666"),
      axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.position    = "top",
      legend.direction   = "horizontal",
      legend.justification = "center",
      panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "#f9f9f9", color = NA),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#E1E5E9", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      plot.margin        = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
    )
}
```

## Data preparation

```{r geo_prep, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
geo_data <- country_table %>%
  inner_join(study_table %>% select(st_reg_id, era), by = "st_reg_id") %>%
  filter(st_reg_id %in% cohort_ids) %>%
  count(era, country_std, income_group, name = "n_trial_countries")

# QC
geo_data %>% count(era, income_group)
```

## Figure 5.1 — Top 10 countries by registration era

```{r fig51_top_countries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
top10_countries <- geo_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(country_std)) %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  slice_max(n_trial_countries, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(country_ordered = reorder(country_std, -rank))

fig51 <- ggplot(top10_countries, aes(y = country_ordered, x = n_trial_countries,
                                     fill = income_group)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", alpha = 0.9, width = 0.75) +
  facet_wrap(~era, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = income_colors) +
  labs(title    = "Figure 5.1. Top 10 countries by registration era",
       x = "Number of trials", y = "Country", fill = "Income group") +
  theme_bar(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig51_top10_countries_by_era.png"), fig51, width = 10, height = 12, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig51
```

## Figure 5.2 — Income group composition by era

```{r fig52_income_pies, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fig52_data <- geo_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(income_group)) %>%
  count(era, income_group, wt = n_trial_countries, name = "trials") %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  mutate(pct = trials / sum(trials)) %>%
  ungroup()

pie_colors <- c(
  "High income"         = "skyblue3",
  "Upper middle income" = "skyblue4",
  "Lower middle income" = "darkgreen",
  "Low income"          = "darkred"
)

fig52 <- fig52_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = pct, fill = income_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, position = position_stack()) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "white", size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
  facet_wrap(~era, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pie_colors) +
  labs(title = "Figure 5.2. Geographic representation by era") +
  theme_void(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig52_income_composition_by_era.png"), fig52, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig52
```

## Figure 5.3 — Top interventions by era and income group

```{r fig53_interventions_income, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
drug_geo_era <- study_drug %>%
  left_join(country_table %>% select(st_reg_id, country_std, income_group), by = "st_reg_id") %>%
  inner_join(study_table %>% select(st_reg_id, era), by = "st_reg_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(income_group), !is.na(broad_cat_display), st_reg_id %in% cohort_ids)

drug_summary <- drug_geo_era %>%
  count(era, income_group, broad_cat_display, sort = TRUE)

# Global top 7 categories (consistent across eras)
global_top <- drug_summary %>%
  count(broad_cat_display, wt = n, name = "total_n") %>%
  slice_max(total_n, n = 7) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_n)) %>%
  pull(broad_cat_display)

plot_data <- drug_summary %>%
  filter(broad_cat_display %in% global_top) %>%
  mutate(cat_ordered = factor(broad_cat_display, levels = rev(global_top)))

fig53 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = cat_ordered, y = n, fill = income_group)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.85, width = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~era, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "High income"         = "steelblue",
    "Upper middle income" = "steelblue4",
    "Lower middle income" = "yellow3",
    "Low income"          = "orange"
  )) +
  labs(title    = "Figure 5.3. Top COVID interventions by era and income group",
       subtitle = "Global top-7 categories shown consistently across eras",
       x = "Intervention category", y = "Number of registrations",
       fill = "Income group") +
  theme_bar(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 10))

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig53_interventions_by_era_income.png"), fig53, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig53
```

## Figure 5.4 — IPD sharing intent by registration era

```{r fig54_ipd_era, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ipd_data <- study_table %>%
  filter(st_reg_id %in% cohort_ids) %>%
  count(era, plan_ipd_share_yn, name = "n_trials") %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  mutate(pct = n_trials / sum(n_trials)) %>%
  ungroup()

ipd_colors <- c(
  "yes"                      = "green4",
  "no"                       = "pink3",
  "no information provided"  = "#95a5a6",
  "undecided"                = "#95a5b3"
)

fig54 <- ggplot(ipd_data, aes(x = era, y = pct, fill = plan_ipd_share_yn)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.75) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n_trials, "\n(", percent(pct, accuracy = 1), ")")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ipd_colors) +
  labs(title    = "Figure 5.4. IPD sharing intent by registration era",
       subtitle = "Counts (%) shown | Cohort trials only",
       x = NULL, y = "Share of trials", fill = "IPD sharing intent") +
  theme_stacked(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig54_ipd_intent_by_era.png"), fig54, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig54
```

## Figure 5.5 — IPD sharing intent by country income group

```{r fig55_ipd_income, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ipd_geo <- study_table %>%
  left_join(country_table %>% filter(country_slot_n == 1) %>%
              select(st_reg_id, income_group),
            by = "st_reg_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(income_group)) %>%
  count(income_group, plan_ipd_share_yn, name = "n_trials") %>%
  group_by(income_group) %>%
  mutate(pct = n_trials / sum(n_trials))

fig55 <- ggplot(ipd_geo, aes(y = income_group, x = pct, fill = plan_ipd_share_yn)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", alpha = 0.85, width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n_trials, " (", percent(pct, accuracy = 1), ")")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(ipd_colors, "NA" = "lightgrey")) +
  labs(title    = "Figure 5.5. IPD sharing intent by country income group",
       subtitle = "Counts (% within income group) | Primary country analysis",
       x = "Share of trials", y = "World Bank income group",
       fill = "IPD sharing intent") +
  theme_bar(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.5),
    plot.margin        = margin(20, 40, 20, 20)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, title = "IPD sharing intent"))

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig55_ipd_intent_by_income.png"), fig55, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig55
```
